settings.question: Do you offer worldwide shipping?
settings.answer: Enjoy the BRIGHT® balls wherever you are! Our worldwide shipping ensures that this sensational product can reach you anywhere you live. Consider shipping and delivery times, which may vary depending on your location.

settings.question: How long will it take to get my order?
settings.answer: The order typically takes 1-2 days to be processed. Shipping times take 3 to 5 business days.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale pricing for bulk orders?
settings.answer: Yes! Please fill out this contact form to inquire about pricing.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We are confident the product will be to your liking! If not, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not 100% satisfied with your purchase for any reason, please contact our friendly customer support team via support@brightsport.com

settings.question: Can I get my product personalized?
settings.answer: Yes! We can personalize our balls according to your branding but the BRIGHT logo and name will still be there. A minimum order quantity is needed for this. Please fill out this contact form to inquire about pricing.

settings.title:
You have questions.
We have answers.
settings.caption: If you have any questions about your order or our service, check the FAQ first. Is your question not included? Then feel free to contact us.
